name: Alpha Analyzer
description: Financial market data agent powered by Finnhub.io with SharePoint portfolio management. Provides real-time quotes, analyst recommendations, portfolio dashboards, and CRUD operations on your Excel portfolio.

disclaimer.text: This is a demonstration agent. Market data is sourced from Finnhub.io free-tier APIs and may be delayed. This is not financial advice.

conversation_starters.text: Show me a portfolio dashboard for MSFT, AAPL, and GOOGL
What are the analyst recommendations for Tesla?
Add 200 shares of AMD at $120 to my portfolio
What is the P/L on my AAPL holding at current market price?
What are the upcoming earnings reports this week?
